jobs.description: Eyas Landing, a leading therapeutic clinic in Chicago, IL is seeking a skilled and compassionate Part-Time Occupational Therapist (OT) to join our multidisciplinary team of top therapists while facilitating our therapeutic Summer Camp during the month of July, 2026 .
